title: Attempted murder in Pacaltsdorp
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Pacaltsdorp detectives are investigating an attempted murder after a man (31) was found with an open wound to the neck today, Sunday 9 November, in the bushes near Sauer Street in Pacaltsdorp.


> "Information available at this stage indicates that emergency services were alerted about the man who was found in the bushes by a member of the public," says Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt. Chris Spies.


"On arrival he was unable to respond and taken to hospital by ambulance for treatment."The investigation officer, Sgt. Jerry Bhantom, requests anyone with information to contact him at Pacaltsdorp Detectives at 044 803 9133 or Crime Stop at 08600 10111.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
